content: Document Service address for internal requests from the {{productName}}

comment.text: This translation key is used for internal requests to access document service addresses related to the product name. It appears in a label within an input field, prompting users to enter or select their document service location URL internally.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the word 'internal' (داخلي), which is a key qualifier for the service address type mentioned in the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: عنوان خدمة المستندات للطلبات الداخلية من {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation incorrectly implies the address belongs to the product, whereas the English states the address is for the Document Service used by the product. Additionally, 'İcma Serverindən' (From the Community Server) is a mistranslation of 'Document Service'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: {{productName}} daxili sorğuları üçün Sənəd Servisi ünvanı

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Sie' at the beginning is a pronoun (You) and makes no sense in this context. It appears to be a mistranslation of 'Service' or a grammatical error. The sentence structure is also incorrect for a label.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Adresse des Dokumenten-Services für interne Anfragen von {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'internal requests' is translated as 'αιτήσεις' (requests), losing the 'internal' (εσωτερικές) qualifier, which is crucial for the technical context of the setting.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Διεύθυνση υπηρεσίας εγγράφων για εσωτερικές αιτήσεις από το {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Italian translation omits the word 'internal' (interni), which is crucial for distinguishing between internal and external service requests as specified in the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Indirizzo del Document Service per le richieste interne dal {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the word 'internal' (내부), which is a key qualifier for the service address type described in the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: {{productName}}의 내부 요청을 위한 문서 서비스 주소

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'internal' (ພາຍໃນ) is missing from the Lao translation, which changes the scope of the request from 'internal requests' to just 'requests'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ທີ່ຢູ່ບໍລິການເອກະສານສໍາລັບການຮ້ອງຂໍພາຍໃນຈາກ {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the word 'internal' (iekšējiem), which is a key qualifier for the type of requests being described.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Dokumentu apkalpošanas adrese iekšējiem pieprasījumiem no {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'for internal requests' (voor interne verzoeken) is missing in the Dutch translation, which changes the specific scope of the setting.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Document Service-adres voor interne verzoeken van de {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the word 'internal' (intern/interne), which is a key qualifier for the type of requests being described.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Adresa Serviciului Documente pentru solicitări interne de la {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Slovenian translation 'Naslov storitve za dokumente za zahteve iz {{productName}}' translates to 'Document service address for requests from {{productName}}', which loses the 'internal' aspect of the requests specified in the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Naslov storitve za dokumente za notranje zahteve iz {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'internal requests' (các yêu cầu nội bộ) is missing in the Vietnamese translation, which changes the scope of the setting.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Địa chỉ Dịch vụ Tài liệu cho các yêu cầu nội bộ từ {{productName}}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the phrase 'internal requests' (kërkesat e brendshme), which is crucial for distinguishing between internal and external service addresses.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Adresa e shërbimit të dokumentit për kërkesat e brendshme nga {{productName}}
